scenarios.notes: New York Mets @ Atlanta Braves contest 13 and specs 27/28/29 passed target identity, allowlist, odds, and runway gates.
SDK/CLI v0.10.0, MM head 6f3ccc1 with strict allowlist / own-state / bounded-approval coverage, installed MM SDK v0.9.0, and ancillary repo heads were verified.
Expected-address checks passed for ospex-stage-maker-b, ospex-stage-maker-a, and ospex-flow-a; public allowances were bounded.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approvals were created.
Candidates --allowlist-only returned quote-ready rows for both allowlisted contests and all seeded markets; dry run stayed target-scoped.
Tiny live moneyline, spread, and total commitments posted under strict allowlist [13,14], including contest 13, seedSpeculations=false.
A controlled taker filled the MM total quote for contest 13; tx 0x51e2dea37d….
Telemetry captured the controlled fills without unknown-own-fill, owner-mapping, or divergence safety events.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero, target active/pending/claimable positions are zero after postgame, and no orphan MM process remained.
A scratch-state dry-run/cold-start probe loaded state cleanly and did not create duplicate live exposure; live CLI reads remained zero-open.
Official final score New York Mets 10, Atlanta Braves 9 was verified and contest 13 scored via R5/CRE.
Moneyline, spread, and total speculations 27/28/29 settled to the expected winning sides or push semantics.
Winning controlled positions were claimed, losing positions were no-op/not claimable, and final target positions are zero.
Tiny manual/live risk plus protocol fees stayed within the Phase 1 low-cap budget; lifecycle transactions are summarized.
